title: redstone-refined
description: A redstone-focused modpack with building tools and performance improvements. Build complex systems lag-free.
body:
# Redstone-Refined

**Redstone-Refined** is a modpack designed for redstone enthusiasts who want to build smarter and faster. It includes mods that simplify building circuits, automation, and technical systems, along with performance improvements to keep your game running smoothly.

- 🔴 Easy-to-use tools to create complex redstone contraptions  
- ⚙️ Mods focused on optimization and better performance  
- 🚀 Perfect for technical players who want to focus on building without lag  

Build, automate, and enjoy your redstone creations — **lag-free**!


## Why choose Redstone-Refined?

This modpack is carefully curated to enhance your redstone experience without compromising game performance. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned redstone engineer, you'll find tools that help you design and troubleshoot your machines efficiently.

Happy building! 🔧💡
